title: Moong Dal Vegetable Soup
description: A warm, lemony moong dal soup with vegetables for a gentle dinner or soy-free recovery meal.
explanation: Keep the soup brothy for recovery days or reduce it slightly for a more filling light meal. Rice or a millet roti can be added when more energy is needed.
ingredients: 1 cup Beans or Bottle Gourd, chopped
instructions: Cook moong dal with turmeric until very soft.
Heat oil, add cumin, tomato, carrot, and beans. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add cooked dal, water or stock, salt, and pepper. Simmer until the vegetables are tender.
Blend a small portion if a thicker soup is preferred, then add lemon and coriander.
Serve hot; add rice or millet roti if this needs to be a fuller dinner.
